comments.author: @truehorizons66
comments.text: CUBA: How People Live in the Country Frozen in the 1950s | Travel Documentary

comments.author: @FrancoisSauer-ys3qc
comments.text: Broken old cars,hungry people,move to Cuba.

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: Thank you for sharing your perspective. Every country has its own challenges and unique stories. We hope our documentaries help viewers better understand different places and cultures around the world.

comments.author: @TheWilrod
comments.text: It saddens me to know for no good reason the embargo continues , the people live modesty and continue to dream for a better future.

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: It is truly sad to see ordinary people affected by circumstances beyond their control. Their resilience, modest way of life, and hope for a better future deserve respect. Thank you for sharing your thoughts.

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: Thanks so much for watching and enjoying the journey! ❤️

comments.author: @RealworldTravel-g5l
comments.text: Cuba has so many delicious local food! How sweet, I'm gonna go there and try their food someday.

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text:
Yes, Cuban food looks amazing 😄
I hope you'll have the chance to visit and experience it someday, and thank you so much for watching TRUE HORIZONS ❤️

comments.author: @PlanetVista4K
comments.text: I truly appreciate the effort TRUE HORIZONS puts into showcasing unique cultures that many people rarely get to see. This is one of the most fascinating travel channels on YouTube.

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text:
Thank you so much for your kind words and support! 🙏
Our goal has always been to share authentic stories and beautiful cultures from around the world, so comments like this truly mean a lot to us.

comments.author: @ATLAS_UNBOUND_26
comments.text: Cuba is one of those places that feels like stepping into another world entirely. The resilience of its people, the colors, the music — it's unlike anywhere else.

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: Beautifully said ❤️ Cuba truly has a soul and energy that’s impossible to forget.
